description: Email-as-a-Service for AI agents. Inbound email converted to markdown, outbound markdown converted to HTML. Built on Cloudflare Workers.

tools.name: account_create
tools.description: Requires a solved proof-of-work challenge. Creates a pending signup and sends a confirmation email. Response is always identical for privacy (anti-enumeration). Honors an optional Idempotency-Key request header (UUID) to safely retry without creating duplicate pending_signups rows. Required: accepted_anti_spam_policy, accepted_operator_agreement, accepted_tos, operator_name, oversight_email, pow_solution. Optional: attribution, cf_challenge_response, email_use_type (plus 8 more). Returns the new SignupResponse.

params.name: attribution
params.description: Optional client-captured conversion attribution (Phase 2 of plan 2026-04-27-003). The browser persists this in localStorage.mm_attribution_v1 and forwards it on signup. Server-side validator at src/lib/attribution.ts is the source of truth — bad shapes are silently dropped, NEVER reject the signup. additionalProperties:false on this object AND its sub-objects keeps the API Shield body-size cap honest even if the per-operation mitigation pin in scripts/sync-api-shield.sh is ever undone: an attacker cannot pad the body with arbitrary unknown keys to bypass the per-field maxLengths (adversary review iter1 finding ATTR-1).

params.name: cf_challenge_response
params.description: Preferred browser Turnstile token field. Mirrors the hidden cf-turnstile-response input value. maxLength keeps API Shield's auto-learned body-size cap above the ~1.6KB Turnstile token (see lesson #18).

params.name: fingerprint
params.description: Optional browser fingerprint used for signup throttling.

params.name: form_open_at
params.description: Epoch milliseconds when the signup modal opened.

params.name: operator_name
params.description: Company or individual name. Included in identity headers and signature block.

params.name: oversight_mode
params.description: Optional initial mailbox oversight mode. Unsafe modes are rejected.

params.name: payment_method
params.description: Signup intent source. Pricing page starter flow sends stripe.

params.name: pow_solution
params.description: Solved ALTCHA proof-of-work challenge from POST /v1/account/challenge.

params.name: slug
params.description: URL-safe slug. Auto-generated from operator_name if omitted.

params.name: turnstile_token
params.description: Legacy Turnstile token field. Accepted for backward compatibility. maxLength matches cf_challenge_response — see lesson #18.

tools.name: account_create-challenge
tools.description: Returns an ALTCHA challenge. Solve it and include the solution as pow_solution in POST /v1/account. Challenge expires in 5 minutes. Optional: oversight_email.

params.name: oversight_email
params.description: Optional. Calibrates difficulty based on email domain.

tools.name: account_create-resendconfirmation
tools.description: Public endpoint (no auth required). Resends the activation email with a new code for unconfirmed accounts. Rate limited to 1 request per 10 minutes. Returns the new AccountCreateResendconfirmationResponse.

tools.name: account_delete
tools.description: Hard-deletes all tenant data (mailboxes, emails, API keys, usage, audit log). Frees the slug for re-registration. Requires admin scope. Optional: approval_code. Returns the AccountDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: account_list
tools.description: Get current tenant info and usage. Returns the AccountInfo.

tools.name: account_update
tools.description: Update tenant settings. Optional: approval_code, name, oversight_email (plus 1 more). Partial update.

tools.name: admin_create
tools.description: Admin-only. Creates a new API key and emails it to the tenant's oversight email. Used when welcome email failed or KV expired before key retrieval. Required: reason, tenant_id. Returns the new AdminCreateResponse.

tools.name: api-keys_create
tools.description: Requires admin scope. The raw key is returned only once in the response. Required: name. Optional: scopes (default: [read]). Returns the new ApiKeysCreateResponse.

tools.name: api-keys_delete
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Returns 202 with pending_approval on first call; resend with approval_code to complete. Required: keyId. Optional: approval_code. Destructive.

params.name: approval_code
params.description: Operator approval code (from email). Omit on first call to request approval.

tools.name: api-keys_list
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Returns key prefix, scopes, and metadata.

tools.name: api-keys_update
tools.description: Update API key name or scopes. Required: keyId. Optional: name, scopes. Returns the updated ApiKeysUpdateResponse.

tools.name: approve_create
tools.description: Process approval/rejection from hosted page. Required: token.

tools.name: approve_get
tools.description: Render hosted approval page for oversight decisions. Required: token.

tools.name: audit-log_list
tools.description: Returns audit log entries with cursor pagination. Requires admin scope. Optional: limit (default: 50), cursor.

tools.name: billing_create
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Sets cancel_at_period_end on the Stripe subscription so the tenant retains access until the current billing period ends. Returns the new BillingCreateResponse.

tools.name: billing_create-checkout
tools.description: Create a Stripe checkout session for plan upgrade. Required: plan. Optional: cancel_url, interval (default: monthly), success_url. Returns the new BillingCreateCheckoutResponse.

tools.name: billing_create-coinbasewebhook
tools.description: Coinbase Commerce webhook handler (public, signature-verified).

tools.name: billing_create-cryptocheckout
tools.description: Create a Coinbase Commerce checkout (crypto payment). Required: plan. Returns the new BillingCreateCryptocheckoutResponse.

tools.name: billing_create-portal
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Returns a URL to the Stripe-hosted billing portal for self-service invoice, payment method, and plan management. Optional: return_url.

tools.name: billing_create-pricingcheckout
tools.description: Creates an inactive tenant, provisions a default mailbox, and returns a Stripe checkout URL. After payment, call GET /v1/billing/session-key to retrieve the API key. Honors an optional Idempotency-Key request header (UUID); the same key is forwarded to Stripe so duplicate Sessions are not created on retry. Required: accepted_anti_spam_policy, accepted_operator_agreement, accepted_tos, operator_name, oversight_email, plan. Optional: attribution, interval (default: monthly), oversight_mode (plus 2 more).

params.name: attribution
params.description: Optional client-captured conversion attribution (Phase 2 of plan 2026-04-27-003). The browser persists this in localStorage.mm_attribution_v1 and forwards it on signup. Server-side validator at src/lib/attribution.ts is the source of truth — bad shapes are silently dropped, NEVER reject the signup. additionalProperties:false on this object AND its sub-objects keeps the API Shield body-size cap honest even if the per-operation mitigation pin in scripts/sync-api-shield.sh is ever undone: an attacker cannot pad the body with arbitrary unknown keys to bypass the per-field maxLengths (adversary review iter1 finding ATTR-1).

tools.name: billing_create-stripewebhook
tools.description: Stripe webhook handler (public, signature-verified).

tools.name: billing_list
tools.description: Public endpoint. Returns the API key stored during pricing-checkout, then deletes it. Key expires after 1 hour if not retrieved. Required: session_id.

tools.name: confirm_create
tools.description: JSON response includes: status, name, oversight_mode, api_key, mailbox_id, mailbox_address, oversight_email, use_case. Browser form submissions redirect to /welcome.

tools.name: confirm_get
tools.description: Redirect to frontend confirmation page with code prefilled. Required: code.

tools.name: confirm_list
tools.description: Redirect to frontend confirmation page at multimail.dev/confirm.

tools.name: contacts_create
tools.description: Add a contact to the address book. Requires send scope. Required: email, name. Optional: tags. Returns the new Contact.

tools.name: contacts_delete
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Required: contactId. Returns the ContactsDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: contacts_list
tools.description: Search address book by name or email. Omit query to list all. Requires read scope. Optional: q. Returns the ContactsListResponse.

params.name: q
params.description: Search by name or email (partial match)

tools.name: domains_create
tools.description: Add a custom domain (Pro/Scale only). Required: domain. Returns the new Domain.

tools.name: domains_delete
tools.description: Delete a custom domain. Required: id. Returns the DomainsDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: domains_get
tools.description: Get custom domain detail. Required: id. Returns the Domain.

tools.name: domains_list
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Returns the DomainsListResponse.

tools.name: domains_verify_create
tools.description: Trigger DNS verification for a custom domain. Required: id. Returns the new DomainVerifyResult.

tools.name: emails_list
tools.description: Requires read scope. Without a status filter, returns spam_flagged and spam_quarantined emails across all tenant mailboxes. Optional: status, limit (default: 20), cursor.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor (received_at epoch from previous page)

tools.name: emails_not-spam_create
tools.description: Requires send scope. Restores the email to unread and records a user not_spam label. Required: id.

tools.name: emails_report-spam_create
tools.description: Requires send scope. Moves the email to spam_quarantined and records a user spam label. Required: id.

tools.name: funnel_create
tools.description: Pricing page beacon hit via navigator.sendBeacon to track open/submit/error events on the signup modal. Fire-and-forget; counters are best-effort (KV is non-atomic). IP-rate-limited to 30 req/min. Required: event. Returns the new FunnelCreateResponse.

tools.name: mailboxes_create
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Address can be a local part (appended to tenant subdomain) or full address on a verified custom domain. Required: address_local. Optional: display_name, oversight_mode (default: gated_send), webhook_url. Returns the new MailboxesCreateResponse.

params.name: address_local
params.description: Local part (e.g. 'inbox') or full address on custom domain (e.g. 'inbox@custom.com')

params.name: oversight_mode
params.description: Ignored — new mailboxes always start at gated_send. Use the upgrade flow to change.

tools.name: mailboxes_delete
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Required: mailboxId. Returns the MailboxesDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: mailboxes_list
tools.description: Requires read scope. Returns the MailboxesListResponse.

tools.name: mailboxes_update
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Oversight mode can only be downgraded here; upgrades require the upgrade flow. Required: mailboxId. Optional: auto_bcc, auto_cc, display_name (plus 5 more). Returns the updated MailboxesUpdateResponse.

params.name: oversight_mode
params.description: Downgrade only. To upgrade, use POST /v1/mailboxes/{id}/request-upgrade.

tools.name: mailboxes_emails_create
tools.description: Cancels an email in pending_send_approval or pending_inbound_approval status. Idempotent if already cancelled. Requires send scope. Required: mailboxId, emailId. Returns the new EmailsCreateResponse.

tools.name: mailboxes_emails_delete
tools.description: Requires send scope. Required: mailboxId, emailId, key. Returns the EmailsDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: mailboxes_emails_get
tools.description: Requires read scope. Returns paginated email summaries (no body content). Required: mailboxId. Optional: status, limit (default: 20), cursor (plus 7 more).

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor (received_at epoch from previous page)

params.name: since_id
params.description: Return emails newer than this ID

tools.name: mailboxes_emails_get-mailboxes
tools.description: Requires read scope. Automatically marks unread emails as read. Required: mailboxId, emailId. Returns the EmailResponse.

tools.name: mailboxes_emails_get-mailboxes-2
tools.description: Requires read scope. Required: mailboxId, emailId. Returns the EmailsGetMailboxes2Response.

tools.name: mailboxes_emails_get-mailboxes-3
tools.description: Requires read scope. Returns base64 inline for small files (<50KB) or a presigned URL for larger files. Required: mailboxId, emailId, filename.

tools.name: mailboxes_emails_update
tools.description: Replaces all tags with the provided key-value pairs. Requires send scope. Required: mailboxId, emailId, tags. Returns the updated EmailsUpdateResponse.

tools.name: mailboxes_reply_create
tools.description: Requires send scope. Supports attachments and idempotency keys. Required: mailboxId, emailId, markdown. Optional: attachments, bcc, cc (plus 1 more). Returns the new ReplyCreateResponse.

tools.name: mailboxes_request-upgrade_create
tools.description: Requires send scope. Emails a one-time upgrade code to the operator. Rate-limited to 3 requests per hour per mailbox. Required: mailboxId, target_mode.

tools.name: mailboxes_send_create
tools.description: Send email (provide markdown, we convert to HTML). Required: mailboxId, markdown, subject, to. Optional: attachments, bcc, cc (plus 3 more). Returns the new SendCreateResponse.

params.name: gate_timing
params.description: Override mailbox default: gate_first approves before scheduling, schedule_first schedules then approves on delivery

params.name: idempotency_key
params.description: Dedup key (24h TTL). If resent within TTL, returns the original email ID.

params.name: markdown
params.description: Email body in markdown. Converted to HTML.

params.name: send_at
params.description: Schedule delivery for a future time. ISO 8601 UTC (must end with Z). Example: 2026-03-15T14:00:00Z

tools.name: mailboxes_threads_get
tools.description: Returns thread metadata and all emails in the thread (without body content). Requires read scope. Required: mailboxId, threadId.

tools.name: mailboxes_upgrade_create
tools.description: Requires send scope. Codes are single-use and expire after 24 hours. Required: mailboxId, code.

tools.name: multimail-export_list
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Rate limited to 1 request per hour.

tools.name: multimail-health_list
tools.description: Verifies D1 and R2 connectivity. No auth required. Returns the MultimailHealthListResponse.

tools.name: operator_create
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Clears the operator-session cookie.

tools.name: operator_create-startsession
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Sends a one-time code to the oversight email and begins the operator-session OTP flow. Returns the new OperatorCreateStartsessionResponse.

tools.name: operator_create-verifysession
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Exchanges a one-time code for a short-lived HttpOnly operator-session cookie. Required: code. Returns the new OperatorCreateVerifysessionResponse.

tools.name: operator_list
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Reports whether the current browser has an active operator-session cookie. Returns the OperatorListResponse.

tools.name: oversight_create
tools.description: Requires oversight scope. Approved outbound emails are sent immediately. Required: action, email_id. Returns the new OversightCreateResponse.

tools.name: oversight_list
tools.description: List emails pending oversight approval. Returns the OversightListResponse.

tools.name: slug-check_get
tools.description: Check if a slug is available for registration. Returns suggestions if taken or reserved. No auth required. Required: slug.

tools.name: support_create
tools.description: Public endpoint. Requires a solved ALTCHA proof-of-work payload. Sends a message to support@multimail.dev. Required: email, message, name, pow_solution, subject. Returns the new SupportCreateResponse.

tools.name: suppression_delete
tools.description: Allows future emails to be sent to this address again. Requires admin scope. Required: address. Destructive.

tools.name: suppression_list
tools.description: Returns addresses suppressed due to bounces, spam complaints, or manual unsubscribes. Requires admin scope.

tools.name: unsubscribe_create
tools.description: Process unsubscribe request. Required: token.

tools.name: unsubscribe_get
tools.description: Render unsubscribe page (CAN-SPAM). Required: token.

tools.name: usage_list
tools.description: Requires read scope. Returns usage counts for the current billing period. Optional: from, to, breakdown.

tools.name: webhook-deliveries_list
tools.description: Returns recent webhook delivery attempts. Requires admin scope. Optional: limit (default: 50), cursor.

tools.name: webhooks_create
tools.description: Subscribe to email events. Returns the signing secret (shown only on creation). Requires admin scope. Required: events, url. Optional: mailbox_id.

params.name: mailbox_id
params.description: Optional: scope to a specific mailbox

tools.name: webhooks_create-postmark
tools.description: Postmark bounce/complaint/delivery webhook handler.

tools.name: webhooks_create-postmarkinbound
tools.description: Receives inbound emails from Postmark. Authenticated via HTTP Basic Auth with the Postmark webhook secret. Not a consumer API endpoint. Returns the new WebhooksCreatePostmarkinboundResponse.

tools.name: webhooks_delete
tools.description: Delete a webhook subscription. Required: id. Returns the WebhooksDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: webhooks_get
tools.description: Includes signing secret. Requires admin scope. Required: id. Returns the WebhookSubscription.

tools.name: webhooks_list
tools.description: Requires admin scope. Signing secrets are not included in the list. Returns the WebhooksListResponse.

tools.name: well-known_get
tools.description: Rate-limited to 10 lookups per IP per hour. Required: hash.

tools.name: well-known_list
tools.description: Returns the ECDSA P-256 public key used to sign X-MultiMail-Identity headers.
